LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS DEFENDANT PING KANG'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. AS PLED, MS. LUM MAY MAINTAIN AN ACTION AGAINST DR. KANG FOR LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RELIEF. (CORP. CODE SEC. 16405(B).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT PING KANG'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled. As pled, Ms. Lum may maintain an action against Dr. Kang for legal or equitable relief. (Corp. Code sec. 16405(b).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
